# System Templates

These templates define system-level truth.

Instantiate these first:

- `BASELINE_INTERPRETATION_LOG.template.md` -> `docs/agents/system/BASELINE_INTERPRETATION_LOG.md` (Tier 0.5 — user-confirmed business-semantic clarifications)
- `SYSTEM_GOAL_PACK.template.md` -> `docs/agents/system/SYSTEM_GOAL_PACK.md`
- `SYSTEM_AUTHORITY_MAP.template.md` -> `docs/agents/system/SYSTEM_AUTHORITY_MAP.md`
- `SYSTEM_CONFLICT_REGISTER.template.md` -> `docs/agents/system/SYSTEM_CONFLICT_REGISTER.md`
- `SYSTEM_INVARIANTS.template.md` -> `docs/agents/system/SYSTEM_INVARIANTS.md`
- `SYSTEM_BOOTSTRAP_PACK.template.md` -> `docs/agents/system/SYSTEM_BOOTSTRAP_PACK.md`
- `SYSTEM_SCENARIO_MAP_INDEX.template.md` -> `docs/agents/system/SYSTEM_SCENARIO_MAP_INDEX.md`
- `scenarios/SCENARIO.template.md` -> `docs/agents/system/scenarios/<scenario-name>.md`

Use these to answer:

- What is true system-wide?
- Which docs are active vs historical?
- What must never be violated?
- Which end-to-end scenarios exist?
